pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him there, but it's just... nothing. just this huge, empty space where my whole life used to be. i dont even know why i bother waking up every morning just to face the silence again.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how nothing actually matters. like, even if i do something great, or even if i suffer, the sun is just gonna burn out eventually and the universe will be cold and empty. it feels like we're just glitching in a void for no reason. why even bother trying to carry on when the end result is always just... nothing?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im typing this. everything is just... gone. the lab results, the funding, the last four years of my life. it feels like i was building a house on sand and now the tide is just in. i'm so tired. not just sleepy tired, but like... my soul is just done. i dont think i can do another day of pretending i have a future.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing but stubs of weeping wax, just like my heart. He is gone, and the silence in this manor is heavier than the stone walls themselves. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through these halls, waiting for the world to finally notice I have ceased to be. There is such a dark, quiet peace in the thought of simply... fading away. To let the night take what is left of me. It feels like the only poetic end to such a wretched tale.

pool.baseline: sometimes i’m just walking through these streets here and i realize that if i just… stopped existing tomorrow, it wouldn't even change the pulse of this city for a second. like i'm just a glitch in the system. a ghost that hasn't realized it's dead yet. it's just so heavy feeling like you're completely invisible.
